creator: baptiste.daroussin@gmail.com
text:
Ok,

After a little bit more investigation, it seems to be a bugs in acinlude.m4,
which never add to CFLAGS and LDFLAGS the path corresonding to the
--with-archive=... and --with-puzzle=... I patch the acinclude.m4, remove the
ugly CFLAGS+= from the makefile, and recreate a shar of the ports, it works
great on my box, let's hope it would be the same on FreeBSD 5.5 ...

If it is ok, I'll contact upstream to send him the patch (the guy already modify
the code to support FreeBSD)

Thanks for your patience

Bapt
